title: Nancy Walsh
content:
I, without bite or sup,
            If thou wert fated for me,
        I would up
            And would go after thee
        Through mountains.

        A thousand thanks from me
            To God have gone,
        Because I have not lost my senses to thee,
        Though it was hardly I escaped from thee,
            O ringleted one!
meaning:
"Nancy Walsh" is a quintessential example of James Stephens's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
